reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/18251157111954801525/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5Q1pteGlhVVJ0VVRsWVVVUmpValZ1TlMxVWFIYxAB

reviews.comment:
happened to pass by this place coincidentally on our recent visit and it was the best decision we made. If you are a coffee fanatic, this is not just a cafe where you can take aesthetic photos but a paradise. The variety of coffee and pleasant aroma makes you not want to leave the store at all once you enter.

Apart from the food, the service of the staff is definitely applaudable. All the staffs were incredibly friendly and so interested to talk us through the coffee procedure even making us try a variety since we showed interest. The manager Mr. Faizan, and Mr. Atharva and all the others welcomed us to an amazing experience, one which we will come back and experience as many times as we can.

Found our new go-to place! definitely try if you are interested to try more than just 'overpriced' and 'instagram worthy' cafes but a place where the staffs feel like family and every sip of coffee feels like heaven!

reviewReply.comment: We’re thrilled you stumbled upon us and had such a memorable experience! It’s always our aim to create a space where great coffee and genuine hospitality meet. The team will be so happy to know they made your visit special. Can’t wait to welcome you back for more brews and good vibes!

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/18251157111954801525/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWUVprZEpSSGRHYkU1MlVqbDJUbVZrYzJoelJtYxAB

reviews.comment: Absolutely loved the food and coffee!! The staff was so good and polite, Faizan the manager there explained us about different brews! Had a great experience!! Definitely a must try for coffee lovers 100/10 would recommend!!

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Ishita,
We’re so glad you loved the ambience and the coffee! Creating a space that feels warm and welcoming while serving a great cup is what we strive for. Can’t wait to host you again at Coffee Island!

reviews.comment:
Headline: A perfect mix of great coffee, cozy vibes, and friendly service.
"From the moment you walk in, the rich aroma of freshly roasted coffee beans welcomes you. The cafe's atmosphere is warm and inviting, with soft lighting and comfortable seating that makes it an ideal spot for working, reading, or chatting with friends. I ordered the honey almond latte, and the barista created a flawless drink with beautiful latte art—a sign of their expertise.

reviews.comment:
Visited the place for a quick coffee.

They'd 2-3 options to select the coffee Beans, but the coffee turned out to be mediocre.

Nothing great.

They've nice machine, bright and welcoming ambience but when it comes to coffee, nothing appealing.

Maybe it's their barista or else milk.

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for visiting us and for sharing your thoughts. We’re glad the ambience and service stood out, and we’ve taken note of your comments on the coffee. Our team is already looking into this to understand what may have gone off balance that day.

If you’d like, we’d really appreciate connecting with you directly and understanding your preference better,  it helps us calibrate the cup the way our guests enjoy it. You can DM us on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in.

We hope to welcome you again for a cup that truly reflects the Coffee Island experience.
